overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dark, derelict interior space with wood-paneled walls and scattered debris. The character moves through rooms illuminated by warm lamplight, transitioning from a cluttered room with broken furniture through a doorway into a secondary room featuring a distinctive red door.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict room with scattered debris and broken furniture

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the debris-filled room examining the surroundings and broken furniture

entered.detail: tall wooden cabinet with open doors and empty shelves
upended wooden chair with broken legs lying on debris
framed landscape painting hanging on wood-paneled wall
scattered papers, wood fragments, and rubble covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit, wood-paneled room with debris scattered across the carpeted floor. A tall wooden wardrobe stands open to the right, while a broken chair and framed landscape painting occupy the center and left walls. Warm light from an unseen source illuminates the dusty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled room with desk and lamp near exit doorway

events.description: character turns toward the dark doorway on the far side of the room

agents.ego_description: walking toward the room exit while passing a wooden desk with an illuminated banker's lamp

entered.detail: wooden writing desk with illuminated green banker's lamp and scattered papers
dark doorway leading to an adjacent room or corridor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the room, the character passes a wooden desk with a lit green lamp on the left. The camera approaches a dark doorway straight ahead while the landscape painting shifts to the right side of the frame. The debris-covered floor continues throughout the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to room with red door

events.description: character passes through doorway into a second room featuring a red door with graffiti

agents.ego_description: moving through the dark doorway into an adjacent room with different lighting and a visible window

entered.detail: red painted wooden door with white graffiti markings and a padlock
tall window with heavy curtains allowing faint blue moonlight to enter
lit wall-mounted lamp casting warm light on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions through the doorway into a new space where a distinctive red door with graffiti becomes visible straight ahead. A window with curtains appears on the left wall, and a wall sconce provides warm illumination. The spatial layout shifts as the character enters the new room.

scene_state.functional_zone: small bedroom with metal bed and red door

agents.ego_description: approaching the red door while examining the small room containing a metal bed frame

entered.detail: simple metal bed frame with mattress against the right wall
small wooden nightstand next to the bed with items on top

segments.scene_description: The character moves closer to the red door, which now dominates the left side of the frame. A metal bed frame and wooden nightstand become visible on the right side of the small room. The window with curtains remains visible in the background as the character approaches the locked red door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a derelict, wood-paneled interior that transitions from a cluttered living space into a small, claustrophobic room. It begins in a dimly lit area filled with debris, passing an open wooden wardrobe and a framed landscape painting under a warm, dusty glow. As the camera moves deeper into the room, it glides past a wooden desk topped with a lit green lamp before heading straight toward a dark doorway. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the threshold into a new space, where a wall sconce illuminates a window with curtains and a distinctive red door marked with graffiti. Finally, the perspective closes in on the locked red door as the camera passes a metal bed frame and a wooden nightstand in the cramped quarters.
